# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create a Jenkins Pipeline that downloads build artifacts from external URLs provided as parameters and deploys them to production servers. This allows us to deploy pre-built artifacts from different sources (S3, Artifactory, HTTP servers) without rebuilding.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    agent any

    parameters {
        string(name: 'ARTIFACT_URL', description: 'Artifact URL')
        string(name: 'DEPLOY_SERVER', description: 'Deploy server IP/hostname')
        string(name: 'USER_NAME', description: 'User name for deployment')
        string(name: 'PASSWORD', description: 'Password for deployment')
    }

    stages {
        stage('Download Artifact') {
            steps {
                script {
                    def url = params.ARTIFACT_URL
                    def file = downloadFile(url)
                    echo "Downloading artifact from $url"
                }
            }
        }
        stage('Deploy to Production') {
            steps {
                script {
                    def username = params.USER_NAME
                    def password = params.PASSWORD
                    def deployServer = params.DEPLOY_SERVER

                    sshagent(credentialsId: 'prod-cred') {
                        sh "scp -P ${file.name} root@${deployServer}:${file.path}"
                    }
                    echo "Deployed artifact to $deployServer"
                }
            }
        }
    }

    post {
        success {
            archiveArtifacts artifacts: '**/*'
        }
    }
}

def downloadFile(url) {
    def file = new File("artifacts/${url.tokenize('/').last()}")
    sshagent(credentialsId: 'external-ssh-cred') {
        sh "curl -o ${file.path} $url"
    }
    return file
}
